'''Carosi IV''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] destroyed by the expansion of the [[Star/Legends|star]] [[Carosi]] into a [[Red giant/Legends|red giant]]. The indigenous [[Carosite]]s had fled the planet beforehand to [[Carosi XII]].

{{Planet-stub}}
